title: Superheros And Superpowers (SAS)
body:
## This mod aim to had superheros.
There is currently 3 powers (superhuman, fire, ice) with 3 abilityes per power. You can level up and spend your points in the training menu (image in screenshots) to get stronger. To get power you can either craft them or kill hero/villain to drop them.

                                
Have fun !!



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


## Commands and gamerules:

- **/sas_super_power_reset <target>**       reset your power

- **/sas_stats_reset <target>**       reset your stats

- **/sas_add_points <target> <number>**       add the amount of points you enter

- **/sas_limit <target> <stats_category> <number>**     let you customize the limit for each stats category

- **/sas_set_power <target> <power>**     let you set the power of each player 

- **infinitedash**       give you an infinite amount of dash and let you use them without any cooldown

- **damage multiplier**       let you customize the dmg dealt by the skills

- **DoStrongerMobSpawn**       if off enhanced mobs won't wpawn


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Dependencies:

- Player Animator

- Photon

- Geckolib


If you make a video on the mod dm me on discord, I will put a link to the video on the mod page.

The Discord if you find bugs or if you have any suggestions: 
https://discord.gg/YXWswvUKAv
